whatWasImplemented: src/lib/subscription.ts — replaces the always-true stub. checkSubscription(userId) reads profiles.subscription_status, trial_ends_at, current_period_end via service-role client and returns {active, status, reason, upgradeUrl}. Rules match the validation contract:
- active -> active (period_end null is treated as active to tolerate mid-flight Stripe sync)
src/app/api/crawl/start/route.ts — replaces the 403 reject with 402 {error:'subscription_inactive', reason, upgrade_url}.

src/app/api/chat/session/route.ts — gates widget chat on the SITE OWNER's subscription (not the caller, since widget callers are anonymous). 402 response includes upgrade_url so the widget / site owner can redirect to /dashboard/billing.
src/__tests__/subscription-gate.test.ts — 14 unit tests with mocked service client; covers every status/date branch plus parametric coverage over non-recoverable statuses.

src/__tests__/subscription-gate-routes.test.ts — 3 integration-lite tests proving /api/crawl/start returns 402 and /api/chat/session checks the OWNER (not the visitor), using vi.hoisted to keep the vi.mock references pre-initialized.
vitest.config.ts — removed the M0-era coverage exclusion for src/lib/subscription.ts now that it carries real logic and is fully covered.
whatWasLeftUndone: Widget-side UI for the 402 state is M3 (VAL-QUOTA-011 and the degrade area in M8). The API contract Brandon needs for that wiring is now set.
discoveredIssues: vi.mock references in subscription-gate-routes.test.ts hit the 'Cannot access before initialization' hoisting trap; resolved with vi.hoisted. Worth documenting as a convention for future tests that mock factory-created fn references.

chat-session.test.ts needed owner_id added to its site fixtures + a subscription stub because every ready-site path now flows through checkSubscription. Updated in this feature so the existing suite remains green.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 280 passed / 1 skipped / 38 files (+17 new across subscription-gate + routes). 0 regressions after updating chat-session fixtures.

manualChecks.action: Direct call checkSubscription for a trialing user with expired trial_ends_at
POST /api/chat/session with owner whose subscription is past_due
